message:
refactor(abi): simplify pthread symbol resolution and add direct-libc test

Replace the multi-version glibc fallback chain (dlvsym calls for
GLIBC_2.2.5, 2.3.2, and 2.34) with a single call to
resolve_host_symbol_nocache(), consolidating the caching mechanism
into the unified symbol resolution path introduced in 607c192.

- Simplify return logic from unwrap_or(0).then_some() to early return
  with ? operator for more idiomatic Rust
- Add direct_libc_resolution_finds_host_pthread_symbols() test
  verifying that pthread_create, pthread_join, and pthread_self
  can be resolved directly from the loaded libc

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
